text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, February 07. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Planning for future education costs. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Budget tracking is updated. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's break this down. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds critical. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing our household budget today. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Greg Holloway wants to drop secure messaging to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Understood. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of secure messaging now and iterating later is a good compromise. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Got it, Mike. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Made good progress on my work tasks today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
